LanguageData.JDG_ProtectedAgainstHarbingerSpawnsDesc: {0} has successfully called upon the Dark God to smite a foul abomination of the pretender. {0} is confident that no more of these abominations will appear for the next {1}.
LanguageData.JDG_InterrogationResearchDesc: {0} has completed the interrogation of the foul Horaxian abomination and gleaned {1} research points of {2} nature. {0} is exhausted, but confident that this will aid the war effort.
LanguageData.JDG_InterrogationFavorDesc: {0} has completed the interrogation of the foul Horaxian abomination. While no insights into anomalous entities were gained, {1} favor has been earned for brutally annihilating the abomination.
LanguageData.JDG_BreakBecauseBioferriteEquipment: Bioferrite equipment drove them to this.
